title: August 27th, 2022
body:
i rap hard lyrics

https://soundcloud.com/billy-moreno/08272022-i-rap-hard

i lay on a track and black out
knowin one day a train might come
while i'm too far gone to get back out
just cuz i hear a horn
i rap hard

i play on the tracks
knowin one day i might fuck around and get my foot stuck
when i'm too far out
and no one's around to hear the sound i make
when the beat bucks the ground
i rap hard

i knock knowin no one's home
cuz if i kick first i seen the door open
on a scene so clean it's obscene for someone like me to go in
i rap hard to beats i've chosen
back up, wait a moment
peace cocked while i listen closely
then it's that part but i do it solo
if i have to cuz it's truly yolo
and i'm not a fool just cuz you don't know
so you waste time thinkin times square
waiting for the ball to drop when you can fly there
cuz you don't wanna miss the show
put on for your pleasure in the pit below the pendulum
you could leave at your leisure but you didn't though
building a home in a room on a river boat
stead a shedding whatever makes it difficult to even dip a toe
much less take the leap to live in the flow

i rap hard on principle
interest ain't my business
i don't play for points
score my own bars so you can break the joints
looking at em hungry like they owe me money
words start running when i come in
actin outta pocket like i'm talking funny
til i flip em and empty out their pockets
now we both rockin to the sound of all of the change droppin
it's only me laughing which happens pretty often
i'm a savage crackin at the options
it was either breakin out or stayin locked in
i took both roads learned how to knot them
cuz hope floats like flotsam but can not swim
so i'm sober when i get down
unmasked when i got them
at mass singing god damn
cuz there's nowhere i don't call church and sometimes you got to
i rap hard

 out here (to all who participated) lyrics

https://twitter.com/a_k_a_billy/status/1563642299426521091

and to all who participated
i wanna say this loud and clear
but it can wait to the piss is dissipated
and the air is clear
i'm not a sadist
i'm just proud and queer
i'm not the greatest, i'm just outta here
like a homerun someone else hit
and to all who participated i hope your proud of it
cuz i wanna say this loud as shit
i'm out where i belong
and someone like me don't come around too often
so if you wanna show me love you might need to do some walking
i'm sorry when it's awkward
grateful for the offers
plate full from ya presence
tank full from my travels
ain't full of my memories
i leave em on the road behind me
let go what i know
but not what it remind me
i'll be back again
then i can remember
and if i never am
i'll be gone to november
that's why i write these songs
that's why i learned these words
this ain't for myself
i'm speaking to the heard
this ain't from my mettle
i'm grounded in the earth
bound in my circumference
around by circumstance
for instance, i drown in modern comfort
i'm watered by the sky
the rains fall i rise
the wind calls i fly
song burst from my breast
i whistle so high
the sun comes i'm wax
and i burn too fast to learn from that
molded by the fall
the cold of my reception
shatter on connection
holdin on's for y'all
i got different directions
so to all who participated i wanna say this loud and clear
i made it, i'm safe as houses, know my way around it, and i'm stayin out here

#twitter feed

cancelled
